summary: Complete testing of Social Wall and Chat system. Backend: 30/30 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features working - Feed tab with post types (text/photo/song/shoutout), likes, comments; Chat tab with group messaging; DMs tab with conversations and new DM functionality; Settings and Back navigation working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All Social Wall API endpoints properly implemented with validation
POST /api/wall/posts correctly creates posts with user_id, location_slug, content, post_type
GET /api/wall/posts/{location_slug} returns posts sorted by created_at descending
POST /api/wall/posts/{post_id}/comment adds comments with proper validation
POST /api/wall/posts/upload-image handles file upload with size/type validation
DM endpoints (POST /api/wall/dm, GET conversations/thread/unread) all functional
GET /api/wall/users/{location_slug} returns active users for DM targeting
Frontend SocialWallPage correctly requires ff_user_profile_id in localStorage
Homepage 'My Account' button correctly shows 'Social Wall' when user logged in
Settings icon navigates to /account as expected

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Feed, Chat, DMs tabs working; navigation working)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed posts, chat messages, and DMs for testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Wall feature fully tested. All 13 API endpoints working: wall posts CRUD, likes, comments, image upload, group chat, DMs (send, conversations, thread, unread count), and active users. Frontend requires ff_user_profile_id in localStorage to access /social/{slug}. The page fetches user profile from API and redirects to /account if not found.

GET /api/wall/posts/{location_slug}.details: Returns posts for location sorted by created_at descending

POST /api/wall/posts.details: Creates posts with user_id, location_slug, content, post_type (text/photo/song_request/shoutout)

POST /api/wall/posts/{post_id}/like.details: Toggles like on post, returns action (liked/unliked) and likes_count

POST /api/wall/posts/{post_id}/comment.details: Adds comment with user_id, user_name, content

DELETE /api/wall/posts/{post_id}.details: Deletes post only if user_id matches author, returns 403 for unauthorized

POST /api/wall/posts/upload-image.details: Uploads image, validates type and size (<5MB), returns image_url

POST /api/wall/chat/{location_slug}.details: Sends group chat message with user_id, content

GET /api/wall/chat/{location_slug}.details: Returns chat messages in chronological order (oldest first)

POST /api/wall/dm.details: Sends DM with from_user_id, to_user_id, content

GET /api/wall/dm/conversations/{user_id}.details: Returns conversations with partner_id, partner_name, last_message, unread count

GET /api/wall/dm/thread/{user_id}/{partn.details: Returns DM thread and marks messages as read

GET /api/wall/users/{location_slug}.details: Returns active users at location for DM targeting

Social Wall Page UI.details: Feed/Chat/DMs tabs working, post composer with 4 types, settings and back navigation

Homepage Social Wall Button.details: Shows 'Social Wall' when ff_user_profile_id in localStorage, navigates to /social/{location}

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested features working as expected
